name: claude-harness-engineering
description: A complete coding-assist harness for Claude Code: harness setup, a constitution-gated spec-driven feature loop, engineering discipline, and pre-launch auditing.

plugins.name: claude-stack
plugins.description: The complete harness in one plugin — 23 skills: a `start` front door, bootstrap/adopt the tuning stack, constitution governance, the spec-driven loop (brainstorm, specify, clarify, plan, tasks, analyze, implement), existing-code work (understand-codebase, refactor, review-changes, add-dependency), discipline (tdd, debug, verify-done, finish-branch), capture-lesson mistake-memory, production-readiness audit, write-skill, and a SessionStart routing + lessons hook. Distilled from github/spec-kit and obra/superpowers (MIT).
